mapper.sql: r.id, r.batch_id, r.user_id, r.created_by, r.reservation_mode, COALESCE(primary_relation.device_id, r.device_id) AS device_id, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.purpose, r.status, r.approval_mode_snapshot, r.remark, r.device_approver_id, r.device_approved_at, r.device_approval_remark, r.system_approver_id, r.system_approved_at, r.system_approval_remark, r.sign_status, r.checked_in_at, r.cancel_reason, r.cancel_time, r.created_at, r.updated_at

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rd.reservation_id, rd.device_id FROM reservation_device rd INNER JOIN ( SELECT reservation_id, MIN(device_order) AS min_device_order FROM reservation_device GROUP BY reservation_id ) first_relation ON first_relation.reservation_id = rd.reservation_id AND first_relation.min_device_order = rd.device_order ) primary_relation ON primary_relation.reservation_id = r.id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE 1 = 1
AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.id = #{reservationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.status IN ('PENDING_DEVICE_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_SYSTEM_APPROVAL') AND r.created_at <= #{threshold}

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.status IN ('PENDING_DEVICE_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_SYSTEM_APPROVAL') AND r.created_at <= #{threshold}

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.status = 'APPROVED' AND r.sign_status = 'NOT_CHECKED_IN' AND r.start_time <= #{deadline}

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.status = 'APPROVED' AND r.sign_status IN ('CHECKED_IN', 'CHECKED_IN_TIMEOUT') AND r.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL AND r.checked_in_at <= #{deadline}

SELECT FROM reservation r
WHERE r.status = 'PENDING_MANUAL' AND r.updated_at <= #{deadline}
